name: store_sales_discount_band_classifier

sql_predicate: CASE WHEN ss_ext_discount_amt < 5 THEN 0 WHEN ss_ext_discount_amt < 15 THEN 1 WHEN ss_ext_discount_amt < 30 THEN 2 ELSE 3 END = 3
